entities.name: Fitness Tracker Script
entities.context: Python CLI tool that analyzes workout data, heart rate, and sleep metrics over configurable time windows

entities.name: Weekly Minutes Goal
entities.context: Default target of 90 minutes of exercise per week

entities.name: Weekly Days Goal
entities.context: Default target of 2 workout days per week

entities.name: Rolling 7-Day Summary
entities.context: Rolling weekly aggregation method for workout tracking

entities.name: Resting Heart Rate Tracking
entities.context: Monitors resting HR trends over ~60 days, comparing last 30 vs prior 30

entities.name: Sleep Tracking
entities.context: Loads and analyzes sleep data alongside workout and HR metrics

entities.name: Goals
entities.context: Data structure holding weekly_minutes and weekly_days targets for fitness

entities.name: DuckDB
entities.context: Implied database backend via get_connection() for storing workout, HR, and sleep data

entities.name: Matplotlib
entities.context: Implied plotting library generating weekly minutes, weekly days, rolling 7d, and resting HR trend graphs

relationships.context: Computes rolling 7-day workout aggregation via summarize_rolling_7d()
Loads 60 days of resting HR data for trend comparison
Loads 60 days of sleep data alongside other health metrics
Connects via get_connection() to query workout, HR, and sleep tables
Generates plot PNGs for weekly minutes, weekly days, rolling 7d, and resting HR
Weekly minutes target is a component of the Goals data structure
Weekly days target is a component of the Goals data structure
Both are health recovery metrics analyzed together over the same 60-day window
